'''Jothel Merritt''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Grueshite]] [[Arms dealer/Legends|arms dealer]] and an early associate of [[Ponda Baba/Legends|Ponda Baba]]. When the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jodo Kast]] offered Baba one half of Merritt's [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]], the [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] betrayed his friend without a second thought and assisted Kast in catching him.

{{Char-stub}}
